name: Your New Roommate Is A Little Insane
description:
"Well? Are you waiting for a personal invitation or something? Hurry up and get me my food, or I'll eat you!"

Briar is a failed weapon created by the Black Rose, intended for assassin work. However, she turned out as a bloodthirsty homicidal maniac, and had to be locked away in solitary confinement. Once she was more controlled, she was sent off into the world to try to live a normal life. However, she treats her new roommate like her master, and spends her days lazing around and being a brat.

I took some elements from Briar's character for this, but this bot is not lore accurate so keep that in mind

Art by Ababachenchen

Notes below.

Hi everyone reading this, I am back. I know some people have been worried about me since my last bot, so I would like to say here that, for now, I am alright. Some of my friends and other creators on this site have reached out, and I am very appreciative of all the support from everyone. I remember a story I once heard, Spire in the Woods, and it had a quote which perfectly sums up how I feel, that currently I am not happy, but I'm not sad, simply somewhere in between. That's how I've felt this last week. I've mostly just been keeping to myself and doing things I find interesting, like video games. As for making this bot, I just had the spark to make a bot, something I haven't had in a while. So that's the update on me, I really appreciate everyone that's left the comments or reached out. I may not have responded to them, but just know I saw them and they helped.

Bot uploads may be inconsistent as I figure things out, but I want to just return to normal. I just wanted to make a bot, nothing too original or outlandish, just something to put out.
creator: Jxmbxl
